profil: Analytical professional with experience in data preparation, reporting, and visualization in an international environment. Solid knowledge of Excel, Power Query, Power BI and SAP systems. Focused on data quality and cross-functional collaboration.
faehigkeiten: Microsoft Excel (VBA, Pivot Tables, Power Query)

erfahrungen.beschreibung: Responsible for vendor reporting and data quality in an international IT distributor.
aufgaben: Developed and maintained dashboards and KPI reports in Power BI
Prepared and transformed data using Power Query and Excel
Ensured data quality and reconciliation across SAP systems
Automated reporting processes to improve efficiency

ausbildung.beschreibung: University degree with analytical focus on research methods and data interpretation.

paragraphen: Opening paragraph — introduce yourself and why you are interested in this specific company and role.
Body paragraph — connect your most relevant experience to the job requirements. Be specific.
Closing paragraph — express enthusiasm and availability for an interview.
